title: Event Taxonomy Enforcement — Phases 1–2 Foundation
boundary: All BusEvent.define() call sites + canonical event name registry
consumer_purpose: Eliminate freeform event type strings, establish a single source of truth for event names, fix the one true hyphenated name, and prevent future naming drift through compile-time constraints
claim_atoms: Event-names.ts central registry defines all canonical event type constants with const assertion
BusEvent.define() runtime validation warns on unregistered event names
installation.update-available renamed to installation.update_available — only true hyphen fix needed
No existing consumers break because subscription pattern uses definition objects, not strings
All 39 define sites migrate from string literals to EventName constants across 25 files
Backstop test verifies all registered events are in the EventName registry
Session.idle removal deferred to Phase 4 — its zero-consumer profile is documented
Message.part.delta and vcs.branch.updated confirmed already dot-notated — no rename needed
content:
{
  "plan_id": "rl-003-event-taxonomy-foundation",
  "schema_version": "rig.relay.plan.v1",
  "title": "Event Taxonomy Enforcement — Phases 1–2 Foundation",
  "created_at": "2026-05-30T14:00:00Z",
  "architect": "architect",
  "session": "RL-003",
  "audit_corrections": [
    {
      "audit_finding": "session.message.part-delta uses hyphens",
      "reality": "Source code uses `message.part.delta` (all dots). Audit had wrong prefix (session. vs message.) and wrong separator. No rename needed.",
      "evidence": "packages/opencode/src/session/message-v2.ts:537",
      "impact": "None — already dot-notated. Audit was incorrect."
    },
    {
      "audit_finding": "project.vcs.branch-updated uses hyphens",
      "reality": "Source code uses `vcs.branch.updated` (all dots). Audit had wrong prefix (project.vcs vs vcs) and wrong separator. No rename needed.",
      "evidence": "packages/opencode/src/project/vcs.ts:243",
      "impact": "None — already dot-notated. Audit was incorrect."
    }
  ],
  "naming_issues_confirmed": [
    {
      "severity": "minor",
      "event": "installation.update-available",
      "issue": "Hyphen in event name — only true hyphen violation across 43 events",
      "recommended": "installation.update_available",
      "file": "packages/opencode/src/installation/index.ts:30",
      "consumers": [
        {"file": "packages/opencode/test/cli/tui/use-event.test.tsx", "line": 44, "type": "test literal"},
        {"file": "packages/sdk/js/src/v2/gen/types.gen.ts", "line": 2804, "type": "SDK gen"},
        {"file": "packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts", "line": 18, "type": "SDK gen"},
        {"file": "packages/sdk/openapi.json", "line": 19000, "type": "SDK gen"},
        {"note": "No src/ string-filter consumers found beyond definition itself"}
      ]
    },
    {
      "severity": "info",
      "event": "mcp.browser.open.failed",
      "issue": "4-segment dot notation (long but consistent — all dots, no hyphens)",
      "recommended": "KEEP as-is. All-dot notation is the standard. 4 segments are acceptable.",
      "file": "packages/opencode/src/mcp/index.ts:69",
      "consumers": []
    },
    {
      "severity": "info",
      "event": "session.idle",
      "issue": "Deprecated but still published. Zero consumers confirmed.",
      "recommended": "DEFER to Phase 4. Safe to remove anytime.",
      "file": "packages/opencode/src/session/status.ts:44,81",
      "consumers": []
    },
    {
      "severity": "info",
      "event": "global.disposed",
      "issue": "Defined in server/event.ts but never emitted or subscribed. Overlaps with server.instance.disposed.",
      "recommended": "DEFER. Requires semantic audit of event hierarchy.",
      "file": "packages/opencode/src/server/event.ts:6",
      "consumers": []
    }
  ],
  "event_registry_design": {
    "file": "packages/opencode/src/event/event-names.ts (NEW)",
    "purpose": "Single source of truth for all canonical event type strings",
    "is_leaf_module": true,
    "leaf_requirement": "Must have ZERO imports from any event-defining module (session/, bus/, mcp/, etc.) to prevent circular dependencies.",
    "allowable_imports": ["effect/Schema (for documentation types only)", "effect (for type utilities)"],
    "design": {
      "pattern": "Const object with `as const` assertion for string literal types",
      "structure": "Flat record for simplicity — all keys at top level with domain prefix in the key name. Avoids nested object complexity.",
      "example_key": "SessionCreated: 'session.created'",
      "type_export": "export type EventName = (typeof EventName)[keyof typeof EventName]",
      "runtime_export": "EventName values object (const) for runtime iteration and validation",
      "unique_property": "const _values: EventName[] = Object.values(EventName) — exposed as a getter for runtime validation"
    },
    "alternatives_considered": [
      {
        "option": "TypeScript enum",
        "rejected": true,
        "reason": "Enums are nominal, can't use as `extends string` constraint cleanly, and don't produce literal types by default."
      },
      {
        "option": "Effect Schema discriminated union for name + payload",
        "rejected": true,
        "reason": "Payload schemas already exist per-define call. The name only needs to be a string literal type. Schema union would duplicate the payload definitions."
      },
      {
        "option": "No registry — rely on code review",
        "rejected": true,
        "reason": "No single source of truth means no tooling, no schema generation, no CI enforcement."
      }
    ]
  },
  "validation_approach": {
    "phase_2b_step1": {
      "name": "Runtime warning in BusEvent.define()",
      "type": "additive, non-breaking",
      "mechanism": "Import EventName values at the top of bus-event.ts. In define(), if `!EventName.__values.includes(type)`, emit a structured warning via console.warn.",
      "file": "packages/opencode/src/bus/bus-event.ts",
      "before_lines": "export function define<Type extends string, Properties extends Schema.Top>(\n  type: Type,\n  properties: Properties,\n): Definition<Type, Properties> {\n  const result = { type, properties }\n  registry.set(type, result)\n  return result\n}",
      "after_lines": "import { EventName } from '@/event/event-names'\n\nconst VALID_EVENT_NAMES = Object.values(EventName) as string[]\n\nexport function define<Type extends string, Properties extends Schema.Top>(\n  type: Type,\n  properties: Properties,\n): Definition<Type, Properties> {\n  const result = { type, properties }\n  registry.set(type, result)\n  if (!VALID_EVENT_NAMES.includes(type)) {\n    console.warn('[BusEvent] Event \"' + type + '\" is not in the canonical EventName registry. Add it to src/event/event-names.ts.')\n  }\n  return result\n}",
      "risk": "None — runtime warning only, no type errors at existing define() sites since Type parameter is still `extends string`"
    },
    "phase_2b_step2": {
      "name": "Compile-time EventName constraint on BusEvent.define()",
      "type": "breaking — requires all sites migrated first",
      "mechanism": "Change `Type extends string` to `Type extends EventName`",
      "when": "After all 39 define() sites use EventName constants",
      "risk": "HIGH if applied before migration — would break all 39 sites simultaneously. Document as post-migration hardening."
    }
  },
  "migration_strategy": {
    "total_sites": 39,
    "total_files": 25,
    "approach": "Incremental per-module — fan out in parallel via executors",
    "execution_modules": [

    "backward_compatibility": {
      "subscribers_via_definition_objects": "No breakage — subscribers import and use the definition object, not the string. The definition object's `type` field is transparently the same value.",
      "subscribers_via_string_literals": "6 files filter on event type strings and need updating: test/cli/tui/use-event.test.tsx (1 line), packages/app/src/context/server-sdk.tsx (1 line), packages/app/src/context/global-sync/event-reducer.ts (2 lines for message.part.delta, 1 for vcs.branch.updated).",
      "sdk_generated_code": "3 files autogenerated — re-run build script after migration.",
      "globalbus_consumers": "GlobalBus payload embeds event type string. Desktop consumers filtering on type string must be updated, but these are SDK consumers reading from OpenAPI schema."
    }
  },
  "execution_wave_plan": {
    "step_1": {
      "name": "phase-1-rename-installation-update-available",
      "files": [
        "packages/opencode/src/installation/index.ts",
        "packages/opencode/test/cli/tui/use-event.test.tsx"
      ],
      "changed_event_type": "\"installation.update-available\" → \"installation.update_available\"",
      "rename_ts_symbol": "The exported const `UpdateAvailable` should remain as the JS identifier. Only the type string in BusEvent.define changes.",
      "validation": [
        "bun typecheck passes",
        "bun test test/cli/tui/use-event.test.tsx passes",
        "bun test test/cli/run/*.test.ts passes"
      ]
    },
    "step_2": {
      "name": "phase-2a-create-event-names-ts",
      "action": "CREATE FILE",
      "file": "packages/opencode/src/event/event-names.ts",
      "content_skeleton": [
        "// ════════════════════════════════════════════════",
        "// EventName — canonical event type registry",
        "//",
        "// Every BusEvent.define() call MUST use a value from",
        "// this registry. Add new events here first.",
        "// This module is a LEAF — it imports NOTHING from",
        "// any module that defines events.",
        "// ════════════════════════════════════════════════",
        "",
        "/** All canonical event type strings, keyed by PascalCase domain.Verb constant names. */",
        "export const EventName = {",
        "  // session.*",
        "  SessionCreated: 'session.created',",
        "  SessionUpdated: 'session.updated',",
        "  SessionDeleted: 'session.deleted',",
        "  SessionDiff: 'session.diff',",
        "  SessionError: 'session.error',",
        "  SessionStatus: 'session.status',",
        "  SessionIdle: 'session.idle',",
        "  SessionCompacted: 'session.compacted',",
        "  MessagePartDelta: 'message.part.delta',",
        "  TodoUpdated: 'todo.updated',",
        "",
        "  // permission.*",
        "  PermissionAsked: 'permission.asked',",
        "  PermissionReplied: 'permission.replied',",
        "",
        "  // question.*",
        "  QuestionAsked: 'question.asked',",
        "  QuestionReplied: 'question.replied',",
        "  QuestionRejected: 'question.rejected',",
        "",
        "  // command.*",
        "  CommandExecuted: 'command.executed',",
        "",
        "  // file.*",
        "  FileEdited: 'file.edited',",
        "  FileWatcherUpdated: 'file.watcher.updated',",
        "",
        "  // project.*",
        "  ProjectUpdated: 'project.updated',",
        "  VcsBranchUpdated: 'vcs.branch.updated',",
        "",
        "  // mcp.*",
        "  McpToolsChanged: 'mcp.tools.changed',",
        "  McpBrowserOpenFailed: 'mcp.browser.open.failed',",
        "",
        "  // pty.*",
        "  PtyCreated: 'pty.created',",
        "  PtyUpdated: 'pty.updated',",
        "  PtyExited: 'pty.exited',",
        "  PtyDeleted: 'pty.deleted',",
        "",
        "  // lsp.*",
        "  LspDiagnostics: 'lsp.diagnostics',",
        "  LspUpdated: 'lsp.updated',",
        "",
        "  // installation.*",
        "  InstallationUpdated: 'installation.updated',",
        "  InstallationUpdateAvailable: 'installation.update_available',",
        "",
        "  // ide.*",
        "  IdeInstalled: 'ide.installed',",
        "",
        "  // server.*",
        "  ServerConnected: 'server.connected',",
        "  GlobalDisposed: 'global.disposed',",
        "  ServerInstanceDisposed: 'server.instance.disposed',",
        "",
        "  // coordination.*",
        "  CoordSubagentPhase: 'coord.subagent.phase',",
        "",
        "  // workspace.*",
        "  WorkspaceReady: 'workspace.ready',",
        "  WorkspaceFailed: 'workspace.failed',",
        "  WorkspaceStatus: 'workspace.status',",
        "",
        "  // worktree.*",
        "  WorktreeReady: 'worktree.ready',",
        "  WorktreeFailed: 'worktree.failed',",
        "} as const",
        "",
        "/** Union type of all canonical event type strings. */",
        "export type EventName = (typeof EventName)[keyof typeof EventName]",
        "",
        "/** Array of all EventName values for runtime validation. */",
        "export const EventNameValues: readonly EventName[] = Object.values(EventName) as EventName[]"
      ],
      "validation": ["bun typecheck passes", "Import works from bus-event.ts without circular deps"]
    },
    "step_3": {
      "name": "phase-2b-add-runtime-warning",
      "file": "packages/opencode/src/bus/bus-event.ts",
      "changes": [
        {"type": "add_import", "import": "import { EventNameValues } from '@/event/event-names'"},
        {"type": "modify_define", "description": "Add runtime check after registry.set()", "code": "if (!EventNameValues.includes(type as any)) {\n  console.warn('[BusEvent] Event type \"' + type + '\" is not registered in EventName. Add it to src/event/event-names.ts')\n}"}
      ],
      "validation": ["bun typecheck passes", "No existing tests break (runtime warning only)"]
    },
    "step_4": {
      "name": "phase-2c-migrate-all-define-sites",
      "action": "BATCH EDIT — 25 files, each gets import added + string replaced with EventName.X",
      "pattern": {
        "before": "BusEvent.define('session.created',",
        "after": "BusEvent.define(EventName.SessionCreated,"
      },
      "execution": "Per-module batches via smart_batch executor",
      "order": "session/ → project/ → infrastructure/ → ui-agents/ → control-plane/",
      "include_sync_event_bridge": true,
      "note": "SyncEvent.define() sites that also get auto-bridged to BusEvent (via SyncEvent.init()) will also need migration when their type strings appear in BusEvent registry. Currently 4 SyncEvent types are bridged: session.created, session.updated, session.deleted — their SyncEvent.define() calls use the same type strings. The BusEvent bridge registers these via BusEvent.define(def.type, def.properties). Since the bridge uses def.type from the SyncEvent definition, migrating SyncEvent type strings to EventName is a parallel concern.",
      "validation": [
        "bun typecheck passes",
        "bun test test/acp/event-subscription.test.ts",
        "bun test test/cli/tui/use-event.test.tsx",
        "bun test test/cli/run/*.test.ts",
        "All 39 define() sites verified by grep for 'BusEvent.define(' with string literal"
      ]
    }
  },
  "rollback_plan": {
    "step_1_rollback": "Revert the rename: change back installation.update_available → installation.update-available in installation/index.ts + test file. Regenerate SDK.",
    "step_2a_rollback": "Delete event-names.ts file.",
    "step_2b_rollback": "Revert bus-event.ts to remove EventNameValues import and warning.",
    "step_2c_rollback": "Massive — revert all 25 files. Best to do a git checkpoint before step 2c begins so rollback is 'git checkout <pre-2c-commit>'.",
    "advice": "CREATE A CHECKPOINT before each major step. Step 2c (migrating 25 files) MUST have a checkpoint before it because it's the largest change."
  },
  "test_strategy": {
    "new_tests": [
      {
        "file": "packages/opencode/test/event/event-names.test.ts",
        "what": "Verifies every entry in BusEvent.registry is a valid EventName",
        "implementation": [
          "Import BusEvent from @/bus/bus-event",
          "Import EventNameValues from @/event/event-names",
          "Use effectPayloads() or read the internal registry via BusEvent's exported API",
          "Assert every registered event type string is in EventNameValues",
          "Also assert that EventNameValues are unique (no duplicates)"
        ],
        "survival_condition": "Fails if a define() site uses a freeform string not in EventName"
      }
    ],
    "affected_existing_tests": [
      "test/cli/tui/use-event.test.tsx — single string literal update for installation event rename",
      "test/cli/tui/use-event.test.tsx — NO change needed for vcs.branch.updated (already correct)",
      "test/acp/event-subscription.test.ts — NO change needed (message.part.delta is correct)",
      "test/cli/run/subagent-data.test.ts — NO change (message.part.delta is correct)",
      "test/cli/run/session-data.test.ts — NO change (message.part.delta is correct)",
      "test/cli/run/stream.transport.test.ts — NO change (message.part.delta is correct)",
      "test/acp-next/event.test.ts — NO change (message.part.delta is correct)",
      "test/acp-next/permission.test.ts — NO change (message.part.delta is correct)",
      "test/server/project-init-git.test.ts — NO change (server.instance.disposed is correct)",
      "test/server/httpapi-*.test.ts — NO change (server.instance.disposed is correct)"
    ],
    "validation_confidence": {
      "pre_migration": "baseline — run full test suite, record pass/fail",
      "post_step_1": "bun typecheck + affected test",
      "post_step_2a": "bun typecheck (verify EventName type compiles)",
      "post_step_2b": "bun typecheck (verify bus-event.ts compiles with new import)",
      "post_step_2c": "full bun typecheck + full bun test (verify no regressions)",
      "post_sdk_regen": "cd packages/sdk/js && bun run script/build.ts"
    }
  },
  "risks": [
    {
      "id": "RISK-1",
      "description": "EventName type constraint on BusEvent.define breaks all 39 define sites if applied too eagerly",
      "mitigation": "Phase 2b step 1 (runtime warning) is additive and non-breaking. Phase 2b step 2 (type constraint) is deferred until after all sites are migrated. The plan explicitly separates them.",
      "likelihood": "medium",
      "impact": "high"
    },
    {
      "id": "RISK-2",
      "description": "Circular import if event-names.ts imports from any event-defining module",
      "mitigation": "event-names.ts is a LEAF module — zero imports from session/, bus/, mcp/, etc. Validation: verify the import graph after creation.",
      "likelihood": "low",
      "impact": "medium"
    },
    {
      "id": "RISK-3",
      "description": "Desktop app consumers filtering on old string after installation.update-available → .update_available rename",
      "mitigation": "The rename only affects the string value. Desktop consumers use the OpenAPI schema. Regenerate SDK post-rename. If a consumer hardcodes the old string, they miss update events until updated — acceptable risk for a minor rename.",
      "likelihood": "low",
      "impact": "low"
    },
    {
      "id": "RISK-4",
      "description": "effectPayloads() uses Schema.Literal(type) — changing the type string changes the generated schema. Any code that pattern-matches on the literal union will need recompilation.",
      "mitigation": "effectPayloads() is driven by the registry. After renaming the type in installation/index.ts, the registry entry updates automatically. Schema.Literal('installation.update_available') replaces Schema.Literal('installation.update-available'). No runtime effect since the old value was never stored or consumed.",
      "likelihood": "low",
      "impact": "low"
    },
    {
      "id": "RISK-5",
      "description": "Large batch edit (25 files) introduces typos or wrong constant mappings",
      "mitigation": "Each file change is a mechanical search-and-replace with high specificity (e.g. 'session.created' → EventName.SessionCreated). Use smart_batch with exact old/new text. TypeScript type checking catches any mismatch because EventName.SessionCreated expands to 'session.created' — they are structurally identical.",
      "likelihood": "low",
      "impact": "medium"
    },
    {
      "id": "RISK-6",
      "description": "Session.idle is NOT renamed (deferred to Phase 4) but IS migrated to EventName.SessionIdle — giving it false canonical status",
      "mitigation": "Include a comment '# deprecated — remove in Phase 4' in event-names.ts for SessionIdle. This makes the deprecation status explicit in the canonical registry.",
      "likelihood": "medium",
      "impact": "low"
    }
  ],
  "what_is_deferred": [
    "Phase 3 — Adding missing canonical event domains (agent.*, validation.*, checkpoint.*, plugin.*, migration.*, system.*, debug.*) — scope is ~300+ lines across 6+ modules",
    "Phase 4 — Removing deprecated session.idle event (zero consumers, safe to defer)",
    "Phase 5 — JSON Schema artifacts for each event type (docs/schemas/rig.event.*.v1.schema.json)",
    "global.disposed vs server.instance.disposed semantic convergence (separate audit needed)",
    "Compile-time EventName type constraint hardening on BusEvent.define (phase 2b step 2)",
    "SyncEvent projector event types (session.next.*) — separate naming convention, out of this lane's boundary",
    "coord.subagent.phase rename to coord.subagent.phase_changed (judgment call, not a hyphen violation)"
  ],
  "apply_order": [
    "step-1-rename-installation-update-available",
    "step-2-create-event-names-ts",
    "step-3-add-runtime-warning-to-BusEvent-define",
    "step-4-migrate-all-define-sites",
    "verify-typecheck-and-full-test-suite"
  ]
}
